'''Duvil''' was a a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] commando who served in the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Described as a tall and hairy man, he was not suitable for silently sneaking up on targets.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
